creator: brd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Rainer,

I am not able to reproduce this problem in Redports or QAT, see for
example:

https://redports.org/~brd/20120830090023-52162-56629/rsyslog-pgsql-6.2.2.log

Sorry I am not familiar with Tinderbox. Are you building the
sysutils/rsyslog6-pgsql port?


Regards,
Brad Davis
